violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. -Observed handle of ice scoop in ice.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Observed seam of stainless steel wall behind grill and fryer has built up food. -Observed floor under grill and fryer needs to be cleaned.

Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Food removed from original packaging was not placed in a clean and sanitized container. -Observed food in refrigerator, placed in non-food grade garbage bag.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Observed employee washing hands in dishwater rather that in hand sink.
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
